examples.eng: Laughter is the best medicine.
Mary broke into laughter.
He wobbled with laughter.
He shook with laughter.
Mary pealed with laughter.
The audience roared with laughter.
I split my sides with laughter.
Laughter is a vent of any sudden joy.
Laughter rippled over the audience.
He went into paroxysms of laughter.
She snorted with laughter.
She gave a squeal of laughter.
I tried to stifle my laughter.
Audiences roared with laughter.
examples.ru: Слушатели так и покатились со смеху.

examples.eng: The room reverberated with laughter.
The crowd was helpless with laughter.
He makes audiences howl with laughter.
examples.ru: Он заставляет зрителей покатиться со смеху.

examples.eng: even in laughter the heart is sorrowful
examples.ru: даже смеясь, сердце плачет от горя

examples.eng: Laughter animated his face for a moment.
examples.ru: От смеха лицо его на мгновение оживилось.

examples.eng: Suddenly, the group burst into laughter.
Theirs was a house filled with laughter.
The room was filled with giddy laughter.
The children's laughter was still ringing in my ears.
examples.ru: Детский смех всё ещё звучал в моих ушах.

examples.eng: Laughter is one of the most infectious expressions of emotion.
examples.ru: Смех — это одно из наиболее заразительных проявлений эмоций.

examples.eng: He let out a roar of laughter.
Foster joined in the laughter.
He burst into raucous laughter.
examples.ru: Он разразился хриплым смехом. / Он громко расхохотался.

examples.eng: He enjoyed the laughter of the crowd.
Alex gave another bellow of laughter.
The whole room rang with their laughter.
